summary: Frontend-only validation completed against public URL. All requested SWAP marketplace flows passed, including routing, profile enquiry tel links, mobile navigation, responsiveness, and SEO title/description updates by route.
action_items: No blocking functional issues found in requested frontend scope.
Optional code-quality follow-up: avoid hardcoded domain in /frontend/public/index.html JSON-LD Organization url for better environment portability.
critical_code_review_comments: Hardcoded schema URL in /app/frontend/public/index.html (swap-companion preview domain) can become incorrect across environments; consider deriving from runtime origin/build config.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested routes and interactions validated on desktop and mobile viewport using data-testid selectors. No horizontal overflow detected on mobile home/services checks. Card counts confirmed: dogs=3, cats=10, services=8, blogs=5.
rca of the issue: No functional bug RCA required in this run.
